product_overview: A no-code, client-side portfolio builder that provides a split-pane WYSIWYG editor to assemble, customize, and export professional portfolios as PDF, PPTX, JSON or a static site. The app focuses on instant visual feedback, local persistence, drag-and-drop section management, and pixel-perfect exports.
core_goals: Enable users to build and reorder portfolio sections with a visual drag-and-drop interface without signing up.
Allow inline editing of section content (text, links, images) with immediate preview updates.
Provide theme customization (colors, dark/light) and robust export options (PDF, PPTX, JSON, Static Site).
Persist user state locally and offer full undo/redo history for safe, reversible edits.

features.name: Build Portfolio Sections
features.description: Manage which sections appear and in what order using a collapsible sidebar with drag-and-drop controls; changes reflect immediately in the live preview.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See split-pane builder UI with left sidebar and live preview -> Toggle sections using the sidebar to enable the Hero section -> Drag and drop sections in sidebar to move Projects above About -> See preview update to reflect new order

Navigate to / -> Start dragging a section in the sidebar -> Drop the section outside the sidebar drop zone by mistake -> See section remain in its original position and an inline hint explaining valid drop targets

features.name: Edit Section Content
features.description: Open a content editor for any active section from the preview to modify text, links, lists and images; saves update the preview instantly and persist to local storage.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click a section in preview to open content editor -> Edit visible text inputs and toggle switches to update title and description -> Upload avatar images -> Click Save in the editor -> See preview update with new text and uploaded image

Navigate to / -> Click a section in preview to open content editor -> Upload avatar image that fails due to network or unsupported format -> See an upload error message -> Replace with a valid image file -> See preview update after successful upload

features.name: Theme & Export
features.description: Customize theme colors and mode, then export the portfolio to multiple formats (PDF, PPTX, JSON, Static Site) or import a JSON config to restore a session.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click color swatches to apply theme -> Toggle dark/light mode -> Click Share & Export menu -> Select PDF -> See export progress indicator -> Download PDF file when ready
Navigate to / -> Click Share & Export menu -> Select Import JSON -> Choose a valid JSON file from disk -> See application state restore and preview update to the imported configuration
Navigate to / -> Click Share & Export menu -> Select PPTX -> Start export -> Encounter a render error during export -> See an error message with retry option -> Choose Retry or export as JSON instead

features.name: State History & Persistence
features.description: Automatic localStorage persistence of the entire builder state plus an undo/redo history accessible via UI buttons and keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle a section on and edit a text field -> Click the Undo button -> See the last change revert in the preview -> Click the Redo button -> See the change reapply

Navigate to / -> Make multiple edits -> Reload the page -> See the previously edited state restored from localStorage -> Click Undo repeatedly until history is exhausted -> See the Undo button disable and no further changes occur

routes.description: Live full-screen preview of the constructed portfolio

features.name: Build Portfolio Sections
features.description: Drag, drop, and toggle sections like Hero, About, Projects, Services, Contact
user_interactions: Drag and drop sections in sidebar to reorder them
Click a section in preview to open content editor

features.name: Edit Section Content
features.description: Modify the text, links, and details shown in each enabled section
user_interactions: Edit visible text inputs and toggle switches
Add or remove features (like skills, services, projects)

features.name: Theme and Export
features.description: Customize theme colors and export portfolio to multiple formats
user_interactions: Click color swatches to apply theme
Click Share & Export menu and select format (PPTX, PDF, JSON, Static Site)
Import JSON config to restore a session
